creator: petef@databits.net
text:
Update:
--- Makefile.orig       Thu May  3 14:16:16 2001
+++ Makefile    Thu May  3 14:16:19 2001
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=      jlj
-PORTVERSION=   1.6
+PORTVERSION=   1.7
 CATEGORIES=    deskutils net
 MASTER_SITES=  http://www.cis.rit.edu/~jerry/Software/perl/
 DISTNAME=      ${PORTNAME}_${PORTVERSION}

--- distinfo.orig       Thu May  3 14:16:49 2001
+++ distinfo    Thu May  3 14:17:30 2001
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (jlj_1.6.tar.gz) = 09e2d6097ced2583aa5ba0c4589acea2
+MD5 (jlj_1.7.tar.gz) = afcecc02e65477b7f5d75810e468e6cc

Thanks,

-pete
